headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Advances 75% Africa Bottler Deal After South African Approval Backing
summary: Coca-Cola HBC has cleared a key regulatory hurdle for its planned acquisition of a 75% stake in Coca-Cola Beverages Africa. The Competition Commission of South Africa has recommended approval of the deal, subject to conditions on jobs and investment. This step advances Coca-Cola's (NYSE:KO) plans to expand its distribution and operations across African markets. Coca-Cola operates one of the largest global beverage portfolios, and Africa is a core region for long-term consumption themes in...

headline: WHOOP Names Kristen Moss its First Chief Communications Officer as Company Enters Next Phase of Global Growth
summary: BOSTON, July 14, 2026--WHOOP, the human performance company, today announced Kristen Moss as its first Chief Communications Officer, a newly created role that reflects the company’s continued growth and increasing global visibility. In this role, Moss will lead global communications, helping elevate the company's brand and reputation as it continues to scale and expand its impact on human performance and health.

raw.headline: WHOOP Names Kristen Moss its First Chief Communications Officer as Company Enters Next Phase of Global Growth

headline: 4 Dividend Kings Are Crushing the S&P 500 in 2026 and Still Have Big Upside Potential
summary: While growth investors scrambled for cover in 2026, a quiet group of battle-tested income stocks started leaving the S&P 500 in the dust. Four Dividend Kings with decades of unbroken payouts are now posting returns that would make most momentum traders jealous, and Wall Street thinks they still have room to run.
